current_phase.label: Host boundary and autonomous development process foundation

current_milestone.label: Create standalone platform repo and codify anti-drift workflow gates

progress_summary: Standalone platform repository has been created and pushed to GitHub at git@github.com:zhaohernando-code/ai-control-platform.git to prevent platform-core work from drifting into managed business projects. Existing Chinese design docs, capability matrix, recovery redesign, and PC/mobile visual drafts are copied into this repo. Host-boundary and project-onboarding gates are active. Current-session platform materials have been migrated into this repo: formal contracts and visuals are active docs, while stock_dashboard autonomous-flow trials/code/tests and root hook route fixes are quarantined under docs/migrations and legacy for platform-neutral refactoring. The current round completed a platform self-trial: isolated subagents produced Context Pack / Work Package and Autonomous Run Evaluation modules, the main process reviewed their files, ran tests and boundary simulation, then accepted the outputs into the platform host.
next_step: Turn the self-trial evaluation into a machine-readable run manifest and artifact ledger, then connect autonomous-run next_work_packages to a platform-neutral task DAG.
